## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes — zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes — zero warnings
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` completes without error
- [ ] UI change? All 8 component states present (default/hover/focus/active/disabled/loading/error/empty)
- [ ] UI change? Token-only — zero raw hex/px/ms in component code
- [ ] UI change? `prefers-reduced-motion` fallback present for any animation
- [ ] New route added? `docs/ROUTE_MAP.md` updated
- [ ] Data shape changed? `docs/DATA_MODEL.md` updated
- [ ] Architecture decision? Appended to `docs/DECISIONS.md`
